evidence: "Finally a show about tech startups that is current and has interesting multifaceted characters."
"If you enjoyed the Aliens series you will enjoy this film."
"the story line has developed and I highly recommend that anyone interested in computers, apps, and the world of tech companies."
"the editing is amazing and key to the entire film."
"I am loving the character development which is not so slow that you get bored with it yet gives you enough information to invested and interested in what they are doing."
"the plot was well thought out, the acting is very very good, and the special effects are just enough to enhance and not overwhelm the actors."
"This is really well made film with a great story, acting, and clearly a large budget which shows."
"the acting is very very good, and the special effects are just enough to enhance and not overwhelm the actors."
"I stopped watching after the first pathetic episode."
"a visual abstract 'painting' that while seeming unrelated and disjointed when viewed in totality becomes a visual masterpiece and a pleasure to watch."

summary: The user shows a strong preference for complex narratives and high-quality productions, particularly in the drama and sci-fi genres. They appreciate well-developed characters and engaging storytelling, while expressing disappointment in productions lacking depth or quality.
